requirement_topic.en: ZABS Mandatory Conformity Assessment + Import Inspection + ZABS Mark
requirement_topic.zh: ZABS强制合格评定 + 进口检验 + ZABS标志
requirement_topic.zht: ZABS強制合格評定 + 進口檢驗 + ZABS標誌

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances imported into Zambia fall under the Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) mandatory conformity-assessment and import-inspection regime for regulated products. Before customs release, the consignment must demonstrate conformity with the applicable Zambian Standards (ZS, which adopt IEC standards) — for refrigerators, the ZS adoptions of IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), CISPR 14 (EMC), and IEC 62552 (energy) as applicable. Conformity is typically evidenced through test reports/certificates (IECEE CB Scheme reports are well-suited because ZS adopts IEC) and verified by ZABS, which may inspect goods at the port/border and at destination. For regulated products, the ZABS mark applies, signifying that the product has been assessed against Zambian requirements. There is no single CE-equivalent self-declaration route: ZABS verification is a third-party / authority-led step that must be cleared before the goods can legally be sold.
summary.zh: 进口赞比亚的家用制冷器具受赞比亚标准局（ZABS）对受监管产品的强制合格评定与进口检验制度管辖。清关前，货物须证明符合适用的赞比亚标准（ZS，采纳IEC标准）——对电冰箱即ZS采纳的IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、CISPR 14（电磁兼容）及IEC 62552（能效，适用时）。合规通常通过检测报告/证书证明（IECEE CB体系报告因ZS采纳IEC而尤为适合），并由ZABS核验，ZABS可在口岸/边境及目的地检查货物。对受监管产品，适用ZABS标志，表示产品已按赞比亚要求评定。不存在单一等同CE的自我声明路径：ZABS核验为第三方/官方主导环节，须在货物合法销售前完成。
summary.zht: 進口尚比亞的家用製冷器具受尚比亞標準局（ZABS）對受監管產品的強制合格評定與進口檢驗制度管轄。清關前，貨物須證明符合適用的尚比亞標準（ZS，採納IEC標準）——對電冰箱即ZS採納的IEC 60335-2-24（安全）、CISPR 14（電磁相容）及IEC 62552（能效，適用時）。合規通常通過檢測報告/證書證明（IECEE CB體系報告因ZS採納IEC而尤為適合），並由ZABS核驗，ZABS可在口岸/邊境及目的地檢查貨物。對受監管產品，適用ZABS標誌，表示產品已按尚比亞要求評定。不存在單一等同CE的自我聲明路徑：ZABS核驗為第三方/官方主導環節，須在貨物合法銷售前完成。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Zambia) — ZABS conformity assessment, import inspection, and ZABS mark for regulated products
ZS IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) / ZS CISPR 14 (EMC) / ZS IEC 62552 (energy) — applicable Zambian Standards adopting IEC for refrigerators
IECEE CB Scheme — internationally recognised IEC test reports/certificates accepted as a strong basis for ZABS conformity assessment

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, administered as third-party certification by CNCA-designated bodies, plus the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) administered by NDRC/SAMR. CCC is a domestic-market scheme: the CCC mark and certificate apply only to the Chinese market and are not accepted by ZABS as evidence of conformity to Zambian Standards, even though the underlying GB standards derive from the same IEC base. The exporter/importer must obtain Zambia-facing evidence (preferably IEC-based CB reports) and clear ZABS conformity assessment independently.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在国内销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），由CNCA指定机构作为第三方认证实施，另需由NDRC/SAMR管理的中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为国内市场方案：CCC标志和证书仅适用于中国市场，即使底层GB标准同源于IEC，也不被ZABS接受为符合赞比亚标准的证据。出口商/进口商须另行取得面向赞比亚的证据（宜为基于IEC的CB报告）并独立通过ZABS合格评定。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在國內銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），由CNCA指定機構作為第三方認證實施，另需由NDRC/SAMR管理的中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為國內市場方案：CCC標誌和證書僅適用於中國市場，即使底層GB標準同源於IEC，也不被ZABS接受為符合尚比亞標準的證據。出口商/進口商須另行取得面向尚比亞的證據（宜為基於IEC的CB報告）並獨立通過ZABS合格評定。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory domestic scheme; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers/importers must build a Zambia-facing conformity package: (1) Test evidence — preferably an IECEE CB Scheme report/certificate to IEC 60335-2-24 (and CISPR 14 / IEC 62552 as applicable); because ZS adopts IEC, IEC-based reports are accepted far more readily than CCC certificates citing GB national deviations; (2) ZABS conformity assessment / product certification — application to ZABS for assessment against the applicable ZS, leading to authorisation to apply the ZABS mark for regulated products; (3) Import inspection — the consignment is subject to ZABS verification at the border/port and may be inspected at destination before release; (4) English documentation — instructions, markings, and the nameplate (rated 230 V, 50 Hz) in English. CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute for any of these steps. Practical advantage: the IEC heritage shared by GB and ZS standards means existing CB-route test data can usually be re-used, so the gap is largely procedural (Zambian certification + inspection) rather than re-engineering.
gap.zh: 中国制造商/进口商须建立面向赞比亚的合规文件包：（1）检测证据——宜为依IEC 60335-2-24（及适用的CISPR 14/IEC 62552）出具的IECEE CB体系报告/证书；由于ZS采纳IEC，基于IEC的报告远比引用GB国家偏差的CCC证书更易被接受；（2）ZABS合格评定/产品认证——向ZABS申请按适用ZS评定，进而获授权对受监管产品加贴ZABS标志；（3）进口检验——货物在边境/口岸受ZABS核验，并可能在目的地放行前受检；（4）英文文件——说明书、标识及铭牌（额定230 V、50 Hz）须为英文。CCC和中国能效标识不能替代上述任何环节。实际优势：GB与ZS标准共享IEC渊源，意味着现有CB路径检测数据通常可复用，故差距主要为程序性（赞比亚认证+检验）而非重新设计。
gap.zht: 中國製造商/進口商須建立面向尚比亞的合規文件包：（1）檢測證據——宜為依IEC 60335-2-24（及適用的CISPR 14/IEC 62552）出具的IECEE CB體系報告/證書；由於ZS採納IEC，基於IEC的報告遠比引用GB國家偏差的CCC證書更易被接受；（2）ZABS合格評定/產品認證——向ZABS申請按適用ZS評定，進而獲授權對受監管產品加貼ZABS標誌；（3）進口檢驗——貨物在邊境/口岸受ZABS核驗，並可能在目的地放行前受檢；（4）英文文件——說明書、標識及銘牌（額定230 V、50 Hz）須為英文。CCC和中國能效標識不能替代上述任何環節。實際優勢：GB與ZS標準共享IEC淵源，意味著現有CB路徑檢測數據通常可複用，故差距主要為程序性（尚比亞認證+檢驗）而非重新設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — refrigerators must clear ZABS conformity assessment / import inspection against the applicable ZS (IEC-based) standards and, for regulated products, bear the ZABS mark before customs release and sale in Zambia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; domestic scheme only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ZABS conformity assessment and import inspection are mandatory gates for household refrigerators entering Zambia, with the ZABS mark applying to regulated products. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label are domestic schemes and are not accepted by ZABS. Because Zambian ZS standards adopt IEC, an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24 (and CISPR 14 / IEC 62552) is the most efficient evidence — the gap is largely procedural. Confirm current ZABS requirements with a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ZABS合格评定与进口检验是家用电冰箱进入赞比亚的强制门槛，受监管产品适用ZABS标志。中国CCC和中国能效标识为国内方案，不被ZABS接受。由于赞比亚ZS标准采纳IEC，依IEC 60335-2-24（及CISPR 14/IEC 62552）出具的IECEE CB体系报告为最高效证据——差距主要为程序性。请向合格顾问核实现行ZABS要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ZABS合格評定與進口檢驗是家用電冰箱進入尚比亞的強制門檻，受監管產品適用ZABS標誌。中國CCC和中國能效標識為國內方案，不被ZABS接受。由於尚比亞ZS標準採納IEC，依IEC 60335-2-24（及CISPR 14/IEC 62552）出具的IECEE CB體系報告為最高效證據——差距主要為程序性。請向合格顧問核實現行ZABS要求。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Representative + Customs & Landlocked Logistics (ZRA; Dar es Salaam / Durban routing)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商/代表 + 海关及内陆物流（ZRA；达累斯萨拉姆/德班转运）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商/代表 + 海關及內陸物流（ZRA；達累斯薩拉姆/德班轉運）

summary.en: To place refrigerators on the Zambian market, the goods must be brought in by a locally registered importer/representative who handles customs clearance with the Zambia Revenue Authority (ZRA) and interfaces with ZABS for conformity verification and import inspection. The in-country importer is the responsible party for presenting conformity evidence, paying duties/taxes, and holding documentation. Zambia is landlocked, so refrigerators manufactured in China are shipped to a maritime gateway port — typically Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) or Durban (South Africa) — and then moved overland by road/rail into Zambia, with transit and any pre-shipment/destination inspection arrangements factored into lead time and cost. Customs documentation (commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, and ZABS conformity evidence) must be in order for release.
summary.zh: 在赞比亚市场投放电冰箱，货物须由本地注册的进口商/代表带入，由其办理与赞比亚税务局（ZRA）的清关，并就合格核验与进口检验对接ZABS。本地进口商为提交合规证据、缴纳关税/税费及持有文件的责任方。赞比亚为内陆国，故中国制造的电冰箱须海运至海港门户——通常为达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）或德班（南非）——再经公路/铁路陆运入赞比亚，转运及任何装运前/目的地检验安排须计入交付周期与成本。清关文件（商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证书及ZABS合规证据）须齐备方可放行。
summary.zht: 在尚比亞市場投放電冰箱，貨物須由本地註冊的進口商/代表帶入，由其辦理與尚比亞稅務局（ZRA）的清關，並就合格核驗與進口檢驗對接ZABS。本地進口商為提交合規證據、繳納關稅/稅費及持有文件的責任方。尚比亞為內陸國，故中國製造的電冰箱須海運至海港門戶——通常為達累斯薩拉姆（坦尚尼亞）或德班（南非）——再經公路/鐵路陸運入尚比亞，轉運及任何裝運前/目的地檢驗安排須計入交付週期與成本。清關文件（商業發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證書及ZABS合規證據）須齊備方可放行。

standards_or_laws: Zambia Revenue Authority (ZRA) — customs clearance, duties and taxes for imported goods
ZABS import inspection / conformity verification at border or destination (coordinated with the registered importer)
Landlocked routing — maritime entry via Dar es Salaam (Tanzania) or Durban (South Africa), then overland road/rail transit into Zambia

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent obliging an export manufacturer to appoint a foreign-country resident responsible representative for product compliance. Chinese exporters typically engage overseas distributors or trading companies commercially, without a statutory foreign-representative obligation. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is responsible only for Chinese-market compliance; that role does not extend to or satisfy Zambian customs/conformity requirements, which require a Zambia-based importer/representative.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，强制出口制造商指定在目的国境内居住的产品合规责任代表。中国出口商通常以商业方式委聘海外经销商或贸易公司，无法定的境外代表义务。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人仅对中国市场合规负责；该角色不延伸至赞比亚海关/合格要求，亦不能满足后者，赞比亚要求设有本地进口商/代表。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，強制出口製造商指定在目的國境內居住的產品合規責任代表。中國出口商通常以商業方式委聘海外經銷商或貿易公司，無法定的境外代表義務。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人僅對中國市場合規負責；該角色不延伸至尚比亞海關/合格要求，亦不能滿足後者，尚比亞要求設有本地進口商/代表。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent obliging appointment of a Zambia-based importer/representative

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue: (1) Importer of record — a Zambia-registered importer/representative must be in place to clear customs with ZRA and present ZABS conformity evidence; a Chinese exporter cannot place goods on the Zambian market without this local party; (2) Logistics/lead time — because Zambia is landlocked, plan for sea freight to Dar es Salaam or Durban plus overland transit, and account for any pre-shipment or destination inspection in the schedule; (3) Documentation set — commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, and the ZABS conformity package must travel with the consignment; (4) Duties/taxes — payable through the importer to ZRA. Note Zambia is not, like the EU, a single horizontal market with an Authorised-Representative statute; the practical equivalent is the registered local importer who carries customs and conformity responsibility. Confirm the current importer-registration and inspection procedure with ZABS/ZRA.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距：（1）登记进口商——须设有赞比亚注册的进口商/代表，以与ZRA清关并提交ZABS合规证据；中国出口商无此本地方即无法在赞比亚市场投放货物；（2）物流/交付周期——因赞比亚为内陆国，须规划海运至达累斯萨拉姆或德班加陆路转运，并在排程中计入任何装运前或目的地检验；（3）文件组——商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证书及ZABS合规文件包须随货同行；（4）关税/税费——经进口商向ZRA缴纳。注意赞比亚不像欧盟那样是设有授权代表法定制度的单一横向市场；其实务等同物为承担海关与合格责任的本地登记进口商。请向ZABS/ZRA确认现行进口商登记与检验程序。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距：（1）登記進口商——須設有尚比亞註冊的進口商/代表，以與ZRA清關並提交ZABS合規證據；中國出口商無此本地方即無法在尚比亞市場投放貨物；（2）物流/交付週期——因尚比亞為內陸國，須規劃海運至達累斯薩拉姆或德班加陸路轉運，並在排程中計入任何裝運前或目的地檢驗；（3）文件組——商業發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證書及ZABS合規文件包須隨貨同行；（4）關稅/稅費——經進口商向ZRA繳納。注意尚比亞不像歐盟那樣是設有授權代表法定制度的單一橫向市場；其實務等同物為承擔海關與合格責任的本地登記進口商。請向ZABS/ZRA確認現行進口商登記與檢驗程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — a Zambia-registered importer/representative is required to clear customs (ZRA) and present ZABS conformity evidence; goods cannot enter the market without this local party. Landlocked routing via Dar es Salaam or Durban is a logistics necessity, not a legal mark
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese law imposes no obligation to appoint a Zambia-based importer/representative

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Zambia-registered importer/representative is required in practice to clear customs with ZRA and present ZABS conformity evidence; a Chinese exporter cannot place refrigerators on the Zambian market without this local party. As Zambia is landlocked, plan logistics via Dar es Salaam or Durban plus overland transit. There is no EU-style Authorised-Representative statute; the registered importer carries the responsibility. Confirm current ZRA/ZABS procedures with a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 实务上须设有赞比亚注册的进口商/代表，以与ZRA清关并提交ZABS合规证据；中国出口商无此本地方即无法在赞比亚市场投放电冰箱。因赞比亚为内陆国，物流须规划经达累斯萨拉姆或德班加陆路转运。无欧盟式授权代表法定制度；由登记进口商承担责任。请向合格顾问核实现行ZRA/ZABS程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 實務上須設有尚比亞註冊的進口商/代表，以與ZRA清關並提交ZABS合規證據；中國出口商無此本地方即無法在尚比亞市場投放電冰箱。因尚比亞為內陸國，物流須規劃經達累斯薩拉姆或德班加陸路轉運。無歐盟式授權代表法定制度；由登記進口商承擔責任。請向合格顧問核實現行ZRA/ZABS程序。
